headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Salesforce (CRM) After This Year’s 32% Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Salesforce at around US$173.51 is starting to look attractive or still feels expensive, the next sections will walk through the numbers in plain language. The stock has been under pressure recently, with the share price down 4.6% over the last week, 4.7% over the last month and 31.6% year to date, contributing to a 40.0% decline over the past year. These moves sit against a backdrop of continued attention on large software platforms and how they fit into broader...
